name: Chroma ATE Inc.
summary: Chroma ATE Inc. designs, assembles, calibrates, manufactures, sells, repairs, and maintains software/hardware for computers and peripherals, computerized automatic test systems, electronic test instruments, signal generators, power supplies, and telecom power supplies under the Chroma brand worldwide. The company provides video and color test solutions; flat panel display test solutions; electrical safety testing solutions; and LED/lighting and driver test solutions. It also offers photovoltaic/inverter test and automation solutions; automated optical inspection solutions; power electronics test solutions; battery test and automation solutions; passive component, electric vehicle, and semiconductor/IC test solutions; PXI test and measurement solutions; and intelligent manufacturing system solutions. In addition, the company provides photonics, and RF and wireless test solutions, as well as turnkey test and automation solutions. Further, it offers warranty, calibration and repair, instrument and test system calibration and repair, customer-site installation, product upgrade, training, technical support, and product support services, as well as replacement parts. The company's products are used in information technology, communication, aerospace, defense, and other industries. Chroma ATE Inc. was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
